sentences.target: Ich hole die Schachtel aus dem Keller.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhoːlə diː ˈʃaxtl̩ aʊ̯s deːm ˈkɛlɐ/

translations.de: Ich hole die Schachtel aus dem Keller.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhoːlə diː ˈʃaxtl̩ aʊ̯s deːm ˈkɛlɐ/
translations.en: I'm getting the box from the basement.
translations.es: Voy a traer la caja del sótano.
translations.fr: Je vais chercher la boîte à la cave.
translations.it: Vado a prendere la scatola in cantina.
translations.zh-Hans: 我去地下室把箱子拿上来。
translations.yue: 我落去地庫攞個箱上嚟。
translations.pt: Vou pegar a caixa no porão.
translations.he: אני הולך להביא את הקופסה מהמרתף.
translations.vi: Tôi xuống tầng hầm lấy cái thùng.
translations.nl: Ik haal de doos uit de kelder.
translations.hi: मैं तहखाने से डिब्बा लेकर आ रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Πάω να πάρω το κουτί από το υπόγειο.
translations.id: Aku ambil kotak dari ruang bawah tanah.
translations.ro: Mă duc să iau cutia din subsol.
translations.ja: 地下室から箱を取ってきます。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular, present indicative; denotes the action performed by the subject.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; marks the direct object 'Schachtel'.
Common noun, feminine; here accusative singular as the direct object of 'hole'.
Preposition meaning 'out of/from', governing the dative case.
Definite article, masculine singular dative; required by the preposition 'aus' with 'Keller'.
Common noun, masculine; here dative singular as the object of the preposition 'aus'.

sentences.target: Die Schachtel ist noch im Wohnzimmer.

translations.de: Die Schachtel ist noch im Wohnzimmer.
translations.en: The box is still in the living room.
translations.es: La caja todavía está en la sala.
translations.fr: La boîte est encore dans le salon.
translations.it: La scatola è ancora in salotto.
translations.pt: A caixa ainda está na sala.
translations.vi: Cái thùng vẫn còn ở phòng khách.
translations.ar: الصندوق ما زال في غرفة المعيشة.
translations.nl: De doos staat nog in de woonkamer.
translations.hu: A doboz még a nappaliban van.
translations.hi: डिब्बा अभी भी बैठक में है.
translations.el: Το κουτί είναι ακόμα στο σαλόνι.
translations.ja: 箱はまだリビングにあります。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine singular nominative; marks the subject.
Common noun, feminine; nominative singular serving as the subject.
Finite copular verb, 3rd person singular present; links the subject to a locative predicate.
Adverb indicating continuity ('still'); modifies the copular clause.
Contracted preposition ('in' + dative article 'dem'); governs dative case.
Common noun, neuter; dative singular as the object of the preposition 'im'.

sentences.target: Wir brauchen noch eine Schachtel für die Kekse.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈbʁaʊ̯xən nɔx ˈaɪ̯nə ˈʃaxtl̩ fyːɐ̯ diː ˈkeːksə/

translations.de: Wir brauchen noch eine Schachtel für die Kekse.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈbʁaʊ̯xən nɔx ˈaɪ̯nə ˈʃaxtl̩ fyːɐ̯ diː ˈkeːksə/
translations.en: We still need a box for the cookies.
translations.es: Todavía necesitamos una caja para las galletas.
translations.fr: On a encore besoin d'une boîte pour les biscuits.
translations.it: Ci serve ancora una scatola per i biscotti.
translations.ko: 쿠키 담을 상자가 하나 더 필요해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们还需要一个装饼干的盒子。
translations.yue: 我哋仲需要一個裝曲奇嘅盒。
translations.ru: Нам всё ещё нужна коробка для печенья.
translations.pt: Ainda precisamos de uma caixa para os biscoitos.
translations.tr: Kurabiyeler için bir kutuya hâlâ ihtiyacımız var.
translations.vi: Chúng ta vẫn cần một cái hộp để đựng bánh quy.
translations.ar: ما زلنا نحتاج إلى صندوق للبسكويت.
translations.nl: We hebben nog een doos nodig voor de koekjes.
translations.uk: Нам ще потрібна коробка для печива.
translations.hu: Még kell egy doboz a sütiknek.
translations.hi: हमें अभी भी कुकीज़ के लिए एक डिब्बा चाहिए.
translations.el: Χρειαζόμαστε ακόμα ένα κουτί για τα μπισκότα.
translations.nb: Vi trenger fortsatt en eske til kjeksene.
translations.id: Kita masih butuh satu kotak untuk kue.
translations.sv: Vi behöver fortfarande en låda till kakorna.
translations.ro: Avem încă nevoie de o cutie pentru biscuiți.
translations.da: Vi mangler stadig en æske til småkagerne.
translations.ja: クッキー用の箱がまだ必要です。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 1st person plural present indicative; expresses necessity.
Adverb; here conveys 'additionally/another' in context of needing more.
Indefinite article, feminine singular accusative; marks the direct object 'Schachtel' as one unit.
Common noun, feminine; accusative singular as the direct object of 'brauchen'.
Preposition 'for', governing the accusative case.
Definite article, plural accusative; marks the noun 'Kekse'.
Common noun, plural (plural of 'Keks'); accusative plural as the object of the preposition 'für'.

sentences.target: Ich stelle die Schachtel neben das Regal.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈʃtɛlə diː ˈʃaxtl̩ ˈneːbən das ʁeˈgaːl/

translations.de: Ich stelle die Schachtel neben das Regal.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈʃtɛlə diː ˈʃaxtl̩ ˈneːbən das ʁeˈgaːl/
translations.en: I'm putting the box next to the shelf.
translations.es: Voy a poner la caja junto al estante.
translations.fr: Je pose la boîte à côté de l'étagère.
translations.it: Metto la scatola accanto allo scaffale.
translations.zh-Hans: 我把箱子放在书架旁边。
translations.yue: 我將個箱擺喺書架旁邊。
translations.ru: Я поставлю коробку рядом с полкой.
translations.pt: Vou colocar a caixa ao lado da estante.
translations.he: אני מניח את הקופסה ליד המדף.
translations.vi: Tôi đặt cái thùng cạnh kệ.
translations.nl: Ik zet de doos naast de boekenkast.
translations.uk: Я поставлю коробку поруч із полицею.
translations.hu: Leteszem a dobozt a polc mellé.
translations.hi: मैं डिब्बा शेल्फ के पास रख रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Βάζω το κουτί δίπλα στο ράφι.
translations.nb: Jeg setter esken ved siden av hyllen.
translations.id: Aku taruh kotak di sebelah rak.
translations.da: Jeg stiller kassen ved siden af reolen.
translations.ja: 箱を棚の横に置きます。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, 1st person singular present; denotes putting/placing (dynamic action).
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; marks the direct object 'Schachtel'.
Common noun, feminine; accusative singular as the direct object of 'stelle'.
Two-way preposition 'beside'; with directional placement it governs the accusative.
Definite article, neuter singular accusative; object of 'neben' indicating direction.
Common noun, neuter; accusative singular as the object of the preposition 'neben' (directional).
